title: rangium viridissimum
intro: Rangium viridissimum, also known as the green coralroot, is a plant species that belongs to the family Corallorhizaceae. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to treat digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Rangium viridissimum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
